title: urophyllum woodii
intro: Urophyllum woodii, also known as Urophyllum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Urophyllum woodii include reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of Urophyllum woodii typically include extracts, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions, though more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
